steps.title: Match both parts of the claim
steps.content: The claim requires Juchipila to be a striking sight and to be viewed from afar by the soldiers. The correct quotation must show distance and a vivid visual impression of the town.

steps.title: Reject missing details
steps.content: Choice A describes travel through terrain and does not mention Juchipila. Choice B places the soldiers inside the town. Choice D describes mountain scenery rather than the town itself. The quotation with Juchipila in the distance and shining in sunlight fits both requirements. The answer is C.
